entry.title: Integrate Combine Into an App [SUBSCRIBER]
entry.summary: One of the best ways to test your Combine skills is to put them to use in an app! In this course, put the finishing touches on a Chuck Norris jokes app, using Combine to fetch jokes, translate them into another language, and even - as a bonus - learn how to use Combine with Core Data to save jokes to tell your friends later.

entry.title: SwiftUI Custom Path Drawing - Map Balloon Shape

Audio with AVFoundation [SUBSCRIBER]
entry.summary: AVFoundation is Apple’s advanced framework for working with time-based media, such as audio and video. This course covers the essentials to using the AVFoundation framework to create audio based apps. You’ll learn how to set up audio sessions; record and playback audio; audio metering, how to control volume and rate; special effects, such as pitch and reverb; and generating speech from text.
